subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-07 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: A person of action and an active force are needed, and in this day the confirmations and assistance of God are likewise essential
subcodes.first_line_orig: شخص عامل و قوهٴ فاعله لازمست و امروز تأئید و مدد الهی واجب والا قول و گفتگو
